dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Alright, guys, let's review the safety procedures one more time. We're cruising at 30,000 feet, and I need you to stay seated and follow my instructions."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: LEONARD
dialogue.line: "Yeah, yeah, we get it. We're not going to crash."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, calm and collected, with a hint of a smile.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Hey, we're trying to stay safe here. Can we just relax?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEONARD, rolling his eyes and tapping his foot impatiently.

dialogue.speaker: KATINA
dialogue.line: "I'm going to go check on the other passengers. If you need anything, just press the call button."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, looking nervous and unsure.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "I'll be keeping an eye on you two. Don't think about making any sudden movements."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of KATINA, walking away with a kind smile on her face.

dialogue.speaker: LEONARD
dialogue.line: "Hey, we're not going to do anything crazy. We just want to get to our destination."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, eyes fixed intently on LEONARD and SAM.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Look, can we just talk about something else? This is getting really boring."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEONARD, attempting to reason with ALI.

dialogue.speaker: KATINA
dialogue.line: "I'll bring you some snacks and drinks to pass the time. Maybe that'll help."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, fidgeting with his seatbelt and looking around the cockpit.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We're experiencing some turbulence, but don't worry, everything is under control. Just keep your seatbelts fastened and stay seated."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: LEONARD
dialogue.line: "Yeah, yeah, we're good. We can handle it."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, speaking into the intercom microphone, his voice steady and reassuring.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "I don't like this. Can we turn back?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEONARD, looking out the window at the turbulent sky.

dialogue.speaker: KATINA
dialogue.line: "I'll check on the other passengers and make sure everyone is secure. Don't worry, we'll get through this."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, looking anxious and scared.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Listen, guys, I need you to take this seriously. We're not out of the woods yet. Stay focused and follow my instructions."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: LEONARD
dialogue.line: "Yeah, yeah, we get it. We'll behave."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his eyes locked intently on LEONARD and SAM.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Can we at least get some Wi-Fi? I need to check my email."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEONARD, looking sheepish and contrite.

dialogue.speaker: KATINA
dialogue.line: "I'll see what I can do, but first, let's get through this flight safely. Okay, everyone?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, looking hopeful and pleading.
